caveats: Portfolio Demo uses a cached CFS demo extract.
CFS indicators are planning review signals, not official determinations.
Observed permit activity is not a prediction.

domain_readiness.caveat: Portfolio demo uses cached extract values; verify official source data before final decisions.
domain_readiness.next_data_need: Permit record updates and segment normalization.

kpis.title: Observed Development Activity
caveats: Observed permit activity only; not a prediction.
kpis.recommended_followup: Review Development Hotspots by permit segment and year range.

kpis.title: School Utilization + Growth Pressure
caveats: Portfolio demo uses a cached CFS demo extract.
Permit activity is not the same as student generation.
This is not an official enrollment forecast.
kpis.recommended_followup: Compare school utilization context with observed residential permit activity.

kpis.title: Floodplain Review
evidence: 7,254 Special Flood Hazard Area parcels; 3,229 floodway parcels.
caveats: Floodplain Review is planning context, not a permitting determination.
kpis.recommended_followup: Confirm floodway, Special Flood Hazard Area, and local review requirements.

kpis.title: Utility Readiness Coverage
evidence: True utility capacity and service readiness data are not available in CFS yet.
caveats: Utility proxy does not confirm available capacity.
kpis.recommended_followup: Request WSACC capacity and service readiness fields.

kpis.title: Transportation Project Context
evidence: Transportation context can be reviewed with observed permit activity.
caveats: Transportation Context is a coordination signal, not project approval.
kpis.recommended_followup: Review transportation context near active development areas.

kpis.title: Zoning / Land Use Readiness
evidence: Parcel zoning context is available; official rezoning and future land use data are still needed.
caveats: Official rezoning case records and future land use GIS remain data needs where unavailable.
kpis.recommended_followup: Request rezoning case records and future land use layers.

kpis.title: Model Research Status
evidence: Model Lab exposes relative research signal context only.
caveats: Internal model research only; no exact probabilities or raw values are shown.
kpis.recommended_followup: Use Model Lab to guide questions, then verify source records.

kpis.title: Data Readiness
caveats: Missing official data limits how far CFS can go beyond review signals.
kpis.recommended_followup: Prioritize official utility, school, rezoning, pipeline, and planning context data requests.
